source: Cannot delete tag — {0} entries use it.
translation: Ni mogoče izbrisati oznake — {0} vnosov jo uporablja.

source: Do you want to sync all unsynced time entries to ERPNext now?
translation: Ali želite zdaj sinhronizirati vse nesinhronizirane časovne vnose v ERPNext?

source: Entries older than {0} days are locked. Contact your administrator.
translation: Vnosi starejši od {0} dni so zaklenjeni. Obrnite se na skrbnika.

source: ERPNext is not installed on this site.
translation: ERPNext ni nameščen na tem mestu.

source: ERPNext is reachable and Timesheet access is confirmed.
translation: ERPNext je dosegljiv in dostop do časovnih listov je potrjen.

source: ERPNext Timesheet {0} for {1} is submitted — re-sync blocked.
translation: ERPNext časovni list {0} za {1} je oddan — ponovna sinhronizacija blokirana.

source: ERPNext Timesheet is submitted — re-sync blocked
translation: ERPNext časovni list je oddan — ponovna sinhronizacija blokirana

source: Download all your time entries as CSV.
translation: Prenesite vse svoje časovne vnose kot CSV.

source: Warning: This entry is more than 7 days old.
translation: Opozorilo: Ta vnos je starejši od 7 dni.
Nov vnos (fokus na hitro vrstico za dodajanje)

source: Press H or Esc to close
translation: Pritisnite H ali Esc za zapiranje

source: Work in focused sessions with timed breaks.
translation: Delajte v fokusiranih sejah z odmerjenimi odmori.
